source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH T_REF AS 
(
SELECT 	
LeadSubSourceID,
EntryDate,
MIN_EntryDate
FROM
(
	SELECT A.LeadSubSourceID,
	MAX(B.EntryDate) AS EntryDate,
	MIN(B.EntryDate) AS MIN_EntryDate
	FROM EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING A
	JOIN EDW.FACT_LEAD  B
	ON A.LeadSubSOurceID = B.LeadSubSourceID
	GROUP BY A.LeadSubSourceID

	) M1

WHERE EntryDate>='2022-01-01'
),
T_1 AS
(

SELECT 
	DISTINCT 
	LeadSubSourceID,
	Division,
	SourceGroup,
	SourceCode,
	LeadSubSource,
	TX_SourceGroup,
	TX_SourceCode,
	TX_Channel,
	EntryDate,
	LeadCount
	FROM
	(
		
		SELECT
			A.Division,
			A.LeadSubSourceID,
			CASE 
			WHEN A.SourceGroup LIKE 'FHI-%' OR A.SourceGroup LIKE 'PHI-%' OR
			A.SourceGroup LIKE 'RTW-%' OR A.SourceGroup LIKE 'SWR-%' OR
			A.SourceGroup LIKE 'MAC-%' OR A.SourceGroup LIKE 'MXH-%' OR
			A.SourceGroup LIKE 'PBC-%' OR A.SourceGroup LIKE 'HSI-%'
			THEN
			COALESCE(SUBSTRING(A.SourceGroup,CHARINDEX('-',A.SourceGroup)+1,LEN(A.SourceGroup)),'NA') 
			ELSE A.SourceGroup END AS SourceGroup,
			COALESCE(A.SourceCode,'NA') AS SourceCode,
			A.LeadSubSource,
			A.TX_SourceGroup,
			A.TX_SourceCode,
			A.TX_Channel,
			MAX(CAST(B.EntryDate AS DATE)) AS EntryDate,
			COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN CAST(B.EntryDate AS DATE) < '2022-01-01' THEN '0' ELSE B.LeadID END) AS LeadCount
			FROM EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING A
				JOIN EDW.FACT_LEAD  B
				ON A.LeadSubSOurceID = B.LeadSubSourceID
				JOIN T_REF C
				ON A.LeadSubSOurceID =C.LeadSubSOurceID
		WHERE A.TX_SourceGroup IS NOT NULL
			AND A.TX_SourceGroup!='0'
			AND A.TX_SourceCode IS NOT NULL
			AND A.TX_SourceCode!='0'
			AND A.SourceGroup IS NOT NULL
			AND A.SourceGroup!='0'
			AND A.SourceCode IS NOT NULL
			AND A.SourceCode!='0'
		
		GROUP BY 
		CASE 
			WHEN A.SourceGroup LIKE 'FHI-%' OR A.SourceGroup LIKE 'PHI-%' OR
			A.SourceGroup LIKE 'RTW-%' OR A.SourceGroup LIKE 'SWR-%' OR
			A.SourceGroup LIKE 'MAC-%' OR A.SourceGroup LIKE 'MXH-%' OR
			A.SourceGroup LIKE 'PBC-%' OR A.SourceGroup LIKE 'HSI-%'
			THEN
			COALESCE(SUBSTRING(A.SourceGroup,CHARINDEX('-',A.SourceGroup)+1,LEN(A.SourceGroup)),'NA') 
			ELSE A.SourceGroup END,
			COALESCE(A.SourceCode,'NA') ,
			A.TX_SourceGroup,
			A.TX_SourceCode,
			A.Division,
			A.TX_Channel,
			A.LeadSubSourceID,
			A.LeadSubSource
			
			) M1
WHERE EntryDate>='2022-01-01'

),
T_2 AS 
(
SELECT 	DIVISION,SourceGroup,SourceCode,Count(1) AS Count
FROM
(
	SELECT 
		DISTINCT
		DIVISION,
		SourceGroup,
		--COALESCE(SourceGroup,'NA') AS SourceGroup,
		COALESCE(SourceCode,'NA') AS SourceCode,
		TX_SourceGroup,
		TX_SourceCode 
		FROM T_1
		) M1
GROUP BY DIVISION,SourceGroup,SourceCode
HAVING Count(1)=1

)
SELECT 
	DISTINCT 
	A.DIVISION,
	COALESCE(A.SourceGroup,'NA') AS SourceGroup, 
	COALESCE(A.SourceCode,'NA') AS SourceCode,
	A.TX_SourceGroup,
	A.TX_SourceCode,
	A.TX_Channel,
	CAST('HIST' AS CHAR(10)) AS MappingInd,
	Getdate() as CreatedTS,
	Getdate() as LastUpdatedTS
	FROM T_1 A
	JOIN T_2 B 
	ON 
	 A.DIVISION = B.DIVISION
	AND COALESCE(A.SourceGroup,'NA') = COALESCE(B.SourceGroup,'NA')
	AND COALESCE(A.SourceCode,'NA') = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA')

scripts.text:
INSERT INTO [RDM].[REF_MKTNG_SOURCE_GROUP]
SELECT 
'FHI' AS Division,
'F2F' AS SourceGroup,
'Canvass' AS SourceCode,
'F2F' AS TX_SourceGroup,
'Canvass' AS TX_SourceCode,
'F2F' AS TX_Channel,
'HIST' AS MappingInd,
Getdate() as CreatedTS,
Getdate() as LastUpdatedTS

UNION ALL 

SELECT 
'FHI' AS Division,
'F2F' AS SourceGroup,
'Retail' AS SourceCode,
'F2F' AS TX_SourceGroup,
'Retail' AS TX_SourceCode,

'HIST' AS MappingInd,
